title: Bare Bones x Recolourful Containers
description: Fixes issues with using Recolourful Containers with Bare Bones
body:
This pack fixes issues with textures that arise when you use Recolourful Containers with Bare Bones.    
It does not change any of the container textures (yet).

Fixes include:

- Replacing overidden GUI elements back to normal, such as the anvil, beacon, and recipe book
- Changing master villagers xp bar to be Bare Bones
- Simplifying Recipe book buttons and UI

This pack also supports the Horseman mod, making the lead slot for mounts match the Bare Bones lead item. It also fixes the inventory switch button.

---

Recolourful containers must be placed _underneath_ Bare Bones, and this pack must be placed above them both, like so:

![From top to bottom: Recolourful containers, Bare Bones, Bare Bones x Recolourful containers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd2dd27760e397e748a0a5058091778d92c9d7f.png)

Most of the assets in this pack belong to either the [_Bare Bones_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) or [_Recolourful Containers_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/recolourful-containers-gui) resource packs. Credits to them.

---

![Villager trade menu at master level, left side of image shows original, with detailed xp bar, and right side shows simplified bare bones version](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Tqgfptiv/images/bea12dbc260e12482f197f74805fc0c9be064423.png)
